content: E-GEOD-59351 Assessment of patient-derived tumour xenografts (PDXs) as a discovery tool for cancer epigenomics [meDIP-seq] methylation profiling by high throughput sequencing EFO EFO_0002761 Homo sapiens Validation of methylation data for 9 osteosarcoma Patient tumours and PDXs by MeDIP followed
